creator: kris@pcbsd.org
text:
On 05/10/2012 05:40, Mickaël Maillot wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/167762; it has been noted by GNATS.
>
> From: =?ISO-8859-1?Q?Micka=EBl_Maillot?= <mickael.maillot@gmail.com>
> To: bug-followup@freebsd.org
> Cc:

>  installed first
> Date: Thu, 10 May 2012 11:33:27 +0200

>  Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable

>  2012/5/10 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>:
>  > Maintainer of multimedia/xbmc,
>  >
>  > Please note that PR ports/167762 has just been submitted.
>  >
>  > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>  > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>  > and a committer will take care of it.
>  >
>  > The full text of the PR can be found at:
>  > =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/167762
>  >
>  > --
>  > Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>  > edwin@FreeBSD.org
